mapper.insert: insert into notice (btitle, bcontent, emp_id, com_id, bfile) values (#{btitle}, #{bcontent}, #{empId}, #{comId}, #{bfile})
mapper.update: update notice set bhit = bhit + 1 where bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: select * from notice where (lower(btitle) like lower(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')) or lower(bcontent) like lower(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))) order by bno desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select count(*) as total_count from notice where (lower(btitle) like lower(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')) or lower(bcontent) like lower(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')))
